answer: The top 5 crime report categories in Austin this year are Family Disturbance with 7,791 reports, Burglary of Vehicle with 5,992 reports, Theft with 5,534 reports, Criminal Mischief with 4,235 reports, and Auto Theft with 3,690 reports. These categories represent the highest counts of reported incidents in 2023.
